title: Hierarchy of Formal Languages & Automata (Based on Hopcroft)
description: A visual hierarchy showing the relationship between the four main classes of formal languages, the automata that recognize them, and the grammars that generate them, as described in Hopcroft's foundational work.
relationships: Finite Automata recognize Regular Languages generated by Regular Grammars
Pushdown Automata recognize Context-Free Languages generated by Context-Free Grammars
Linear Bounded Automata recognize Context-Sensitive Languages generated by Context-Sensitive Grammars
Turing Machines recognize Recursively Enumerable Languages generated by Unrestricted Grammars
Each level is a strict superset of the previous (e.g., Regular ⊂ Context-Free ⊂ Context-Sensitive ⊂ Recursively Enumerable)
